languages.text: "Вот как? Так я еще и не успела устроить главное — отстрелить вертлявому половину головы! Пусть почувствует, каково было моему сыну доживать последние дни".

traits.locale_text: думаю, это плохо скажется на настроении народа

languages.text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."
languages.original_text: "Вот как? Так я еще и не успела устроить главное — отстрелить вертлявому половину головы! Пусть почувствует, каково было моему сыну доживать последние дни".

traits.locale_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."
"Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."
"Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

languages.text: 「公平にするなら、このうごめく虫の頭半分を撃ち抜いてあげましょう。息子が最後の日々を過ごした時のように、彼も感じてみればいい」
languages.original_text: "If you want to make it fair, let me shoot half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: 「公平にするなら、このうごめく虫の頭半分を撃ち抜いてあげましょう。息子が最後の日々を過ごした時のように、彼も感じてみればいい」

languages.text: "Öyle mi? Fakat daha en önemli kısma, şu kıvranan solucanın kafasının yarısını uçurmaya gelmedim bile! Oğlumun son günlerini yaşamasının nasıl bir şey olduğunu hissetsin."
languages.original_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle mi? Fakat daha en önemli kısma, şu kıvranan solucanın kafasının yarısını uçurmaya gelmedim bile! Oğlumun son günlerini yaşamasının nasıl bir şey olduğunu hissetsin."

languages.text: «¿De verdad? Pero si todavía no he llegado a lo más importante: ¡volarle media cabeza a este gusano! Que sepa lo que sintió mi hijo en sus últimos días».
languages.original_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: «¿De verdad? Pero si todavía no he llegado a lo más importante: ¡volarle media cabeza a este gusano! Que sepa lo que sintió mi hijo en sus últimos días».

languages.text: “哦？是么？可最精彩的部分还没到呢——让我轰掉这蠕虫半个脑袋！让他也尝尝我儿子最后那段日子的痛苦煎熬。”
languages.original_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: “哦？是么？可最精彩的部分还没到呢——让我轰掉这蠕虫半个脑袋！让他也尝尝我儿子最后那段日子的痛苦煎熬。”

languages.text: « Oh, vraiment ? Mais je n'ai pas encore eu le temps d'en venir à l'essentiel... brûler la cervelle de ce cafard puant ! Qu'il sache ce que mon fils a ressenti pendant ses derniers jours. »
languages.original_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, vraiment ? Mais je n'ai pas encore eu le temps d'en venir à l'essentiel... brûler la cervelle de ce cafard puant ! Qu'il sache ce que mon fils a ressenti pendant ses derniers jours. »

languages.text: "Oh, wirklich? Dabei war ich noch gar nicht beim wichtigsten Teil ... diesem verdammten Wurm den halben Kopf wegzuschießen! Er soll spüren, was mein Sohn in seinen letzten Tagen durchgemacht hat."
languages.original_text: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, wirklich? Dabei war ich noch gar nicht beim wichtigsten Teil ... diesem verdammten Wurm den halben Kopf wegzuschießen! Er soll spüren, was mein Sohn in seinen letzten Tagen durchgemacht hat."
